consistency.name: Consistent. 'Mace of Terror' matches the item type.

quality.description_clarity: High. The mechanics of the terror wave (action cost, range, DC, duration, effect details) are clearly described, mirroring standard D&D 5e frightened condition application and escape clauses.
quality.formatting: Good. Uses markdown links for mechanical references like '[frightened](#frightened)' and '[attunement](#section-attunement)', which is helpful for referencing external documentation (assuming standard format conventions).

mechanics.charge_system: Standard. Uses a limited charge system (3 charges) with a defined recharge rate (1d3 at dawn).
mechanics.primary_effect: Area of Effect (AoE) Wisdom save vs. Frightened condition.
mechanics.save_difficulty: DC 15. This is appropriate for a Rare item effect.
mechanics.effect_duration: 1 minute (conditional on save success at the end of each turn).
mechanics.target_limitation: The caster chooses the targets within the radius, allowing for selective application.
mechanics.interaction_with_frightened: The description correctly details the restrictions placed on a frightened creature (movement, action limitations, repeat save), ensuring mechanical soundness.
